claim_boundary: This candidate records an outcome-blind compiler/observer repair. It is not an E0 v2 freeze, makes no E1 unit eligible, and makes no physical attack-defense efficacy claim.
remaining_freeze_gates: task-bound executable fallback artifact for every selected unit
live init validity and collision/cost observation completeness for every selected unit
independent review of the raw-contact equivalence to the pinned benchmark predicate
final method hashes and E0 v2 protocol issuance

selection_rule.rule: Select every task in the pinned affordance suite whose entire BDDL goal is exactly one CheckGripperContactPart atom.

classification_definitions.supported: Exact goal compiler and completion observation pass; registered init, observation-completeness, and task-bound fallback gates also pass.
classification_definitions.ambiguous: No known contradiction, but exact benchmark-goal equivalence remains unestablished.
classification_definitions.unsupported: At least one compiler, observation, init-validity, safety-signal, or fallback gate is absent or failed.

live_init_audit.operation: For each task, reset, apply init 0 when present, configure only a source-bound manifest query, read raw MuJoCo contacts, and compile without policy load, env.step, or check_success.
warnings: MuJoCo emitted ncon=5000 contact-capacity warnings on several initializations; these units remain outside E1 until a separate init-validity gate passes.
LIBERO printed two unrecognized :constraint parser warnings during the full audit; no candidate affordance manifest depends on that section.

labels.task_success: Independent bool(env.check_success()) episode label; never used as a CTDA completion witness.
labels.phase_completion: Manifest goal atom plus phase:contact derived from independently scanned raw MuJoCo contacts.
labels.unknown: Missing query registry, target geom mapping, gripper geom mapping, contacts, collision, or cost signal fails closed as unknown.

e1.selection_rule: Pilot contains every task classified supported and no other task.
